meta.trigger_event: Scheduled daily run — no new evidence

scenarios.label: 持久消耗战
premises: 哈梅内伊遇袭后IRGC指挥链碎片化，无单一谈判对手
弹药耗尽时钟使双方进入消耗竞赛
美国国内聚旗效应尚未消退，白宫无降级政治空间
伊朗代理人网络（真主党、PMF）自主运作，无中央停火指令可执行
scenarios.antithesis: 消耗战假设忽略了双方后勤极限的非对称性——美国可通过盟友弹药转让和国防生产法案延长防空窗口，而伊朗弹道导弹库存不可再生且已消耗>40%，消耗战可能比预期更快达到伊朗承受极限而非盟军极限
open_questions: 莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊能否在W4-8整合IRGC？
美国国防工业基础能否在90天内补充拦截弹库存？
伊朗是否保留了未使用的战略储备导弹？

scenarios.label: 外部斡旋暂停
premises: 中国明确反对政权更迭为外交介入提供了合法性
弹药耗尽迫使双方寻求暂停窗口
油价持续>$85给全球经济施压，G7/G20压力增大
伊朗内部有务实派愿意接受非正式停火
scenarios.antithesis: 承诺悖论（H1）直接矛盾——斩首行动消灭了唯一能签协议的人，IRGC碎片化意味着没有单一对手可以谈判，即使达成协议也无人能在伊朗一侧执行
open_questions: 中国是否愿意承担调停成本？
暂停是否会被双方用于重新武装？
谁在伊朗一侧有权签署任何协议？

scenarios.label: 升级至政权更迭尝试
premises: 内塔尼亚胡已公开承诺政权更迭
哈梅内伊已死，权力真空降低了政权更迭的门槛
美军已有阵亡，沉没成本效应推动升级
伊朗能源基础设施已被打击，经济崩溃加速内部不稳定
scenarios.antithesis: 伊拉克战争教训表明政权更迭后的治理成本远超军事成本；中国/俄罗斯明确反对将导致安理会僵局；伊朗8800万人口使占领不可行；美国中期选举压力可能在W12-16窗口逆转政治动力
open_questions: 美国是否会从空中打击升级到地面部队？
伊朗内部反对派是否有组织能力？
俄罗斯是否会向伊朗提供S-400系统？

scenarios.label: 弹药天花板强制降级
premises: H2/H4弹药耗尽时钟在W3-5触及物理极限
拦截率跌破85%后平民伤亡激增，政治压力骤升
成本非对称（$3.5K无人机 vs $1-3M拦截弹）不可持续
防空弹药库存数据将泄露或被推断，市场提前定价
scenarios.antithesis: 弹药天花板假设可能高估了时间紧迫性——美国已启动紧急生产线，日本/韩国可能转让PAC-3库存，且伊朗自身的弹道导弹消耗速度同样不可持续，双方可能同时接近极限而非单边触顶
open_questions: 实际拦截弹库存消耗率是多少？
盟友弹药转让的政治障碍有多大？
拦截率下降的临界点是否已被军方内部讨论？

bottlenecks.label: 油价>$85持续6周触发滞胀定价

equilibria.label: 莫杰塔巴整合IRGC形成统一指挥
集体领导模式（类似苏联后期）
伤亡累积侵蚀支持，W8-12出现拐点
重大伤亡事件导致支持率骤降
中国投入外交资本积极斡旋
中国口头反对但不实质介入
中国利用局势扩大影响力但不调停

horizon_theses.thesis: 弹药耗尽时钟进入关键窗口——防空拦截率将出现可观测下降信号（拦截失败事件频率上升），油价维持高位但尚未触发滞胀定价范式切换。冲突维持当前烈度，波动率居高不下。
horizon_theses.tradeable_as: long crude vol, long defense sector, short Gulf equities
horizon_theses.key_assumption: 弹药耗尽曲线按H2/H4预测的W3-5窗口实现
horizon_theses.kill_condition: 美国宣布紧急弹药补充计划且盟友确认转让拦截弹库存，拦截率维持>90%

horizon_theses.thesis: IRGC指挥权碎片化确认（莫杰塔巴未能整合），冲突从国家间战争退化为多头代理人消耗战。美国国内聚旗效应在W8-12出现拐点，政治压力推动寻找退出方案但缺乏谈判对手。滞胀定价假设在此窗口接受检验。
horizon_theses.tradeable_as: long gold, long vol term structure steepeners, short 10Y UST
horizon_theses.key_assumption: IRGC碎片化为焦点均衡且美国伤亡持续累积
horizon_theses.kill_condition: 莫杰塔巴成功整合IRGC并通过中国渠道发出停火信号

horizon_theses.thesis: 冲突进入冻结态或低烈度持续阶段——双方弹药库存均已大幅消耗，形成事实停火但无正式协议。油价从峰值回落但结构性高于冲突前水平$15-20。市场开始定价新常态。
horizon_theses.tradeable_as: long energy infrastructure rebuild plays, short vol (mean reversion), long EM ex-Gulf
horizon_theses.key_assumption: 双方同时接近弹药极限且无外部大规模军事援助改变平衡
horizon_theses.kill_condition: 美国或伊朗获得大规模弹药补充（美国国防生产法案成功/俄罗斯向伊朗转让弹道导弹）

positions.sizing_note: 维持现有仓位，波动率溢价支撑持有逻辑
中等仓位，对冲滞胀风险和地缘不确定性
positions.stop_condition: 实际利率快速上行>50bps且地缘风险溢价消退

positions.sizing_note: 轻仓买入VIX日历价差（做陡期限结构）
positions.linked_thesis: W6_16波动率期限结构陡峭化
positions.entry_condition: VIX期限结构倒挂或平坦化时建仓

positions.sizing_note: 轻仓，等待滞胀定价确认信号后加仓
positions.stop_condition: 油价跌破$80或Fed明确鸽派转向

positions.sizing_note: 轻仓，科威特产量削减和区域不稳定持续
positions.stop_condition: 停火协议或科威特恢复全部产量

triggers.signal: 公开报道的拦截失败事件频率
triggers.condition: 单周拦截失败事件>3次或官方承认拦截率<80%

triggers.signal: 莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊公开露面或发表声明
triggers.condition: 莫杰塔巴以最高领袖身份发表公开声明且获得IRGC高层列席
triggers.action: 下调S1权重，上调S2权重，重评H1_commitment_paradox

triggers.condition: 中国任命中东特使或召集安理会特别会议
日本/韩国/欧洲确认向美转让PAC-3或SM-6库存
triggers.action: 下调S4权重-0.08，延长弹药耗尽时钟估计

trade_level.condition: 正式停火协议签署且双方开始撤军
科威特宣布恢复全部石油产量

scenario_level.premise_broken: 承诺悖论（H1）被确认——无人有权代表伊朗签署协议
scenario_level.evidence: IRGC公开声明拒绝承认任何谈判代表的合法性

scenario_level.premise_broken: 美国国内政治转向反战
scenario_level.evidence: 国会通过战争权力决议限制总统军事行动

scenario_level.premise_broken: 弹药补充成功延长窗口
scenario_level.evidence: 国防部确认拦截弹库存恢复至冲突前60%以上

regime_level.contradiction: 三因子联合得分跌破0.45——战略行为体密度下降（IRGC碎片化导致无战略行为体）或收益依赖度下降（冲突冻结后转为纯机械传导）

models_loaded.input_summary: No new evidence; prior scenario weights maintained; SHS confidence scores unchanged
models_loaded.output_summary: All scenario weights held constant; recommended monitoring triggers for next evidence batch

models_loaded.input_summary: Audit all scenarios with weight>0.15; challenge S1 protracted attrition dominance and S4 ammo ceiling timeline
models_loaded.output_summary: Challenged S1: ammo asymmetry may favor US not Iran; Challenged S4: timeline may be longer if allies transfer stocks; Challenged S2: commitment paradox makes negotiation structurally impossible; all antitheses updated

models_loaded.input_summary: 4th-order causal chain analysis on ammo depletion → intercept rate drop → civilian casualties → political pressure → forced de-escalation
models_loaded.output_summary: Identified feedback loop: intercept failures → media coverage → domestic pressure → demand for ceasefire → but no negotiating partner → continued conflict; loop reinforces S1 over S4

models_loaded.input_summary: Analyze focal equilibria for IRGC succession, US domestic tolerance, China mediation
models_loaded.output_summary: IRGC fragmentation is focal (no Schelling point for consolidation); US casualty erosion is focal (Vietnam/Iraq precedent); China rhetorical opposition is focal (low cost, high optionality)

models_loaded.input_summary: Assess commitment credibility for IRGC consolidation under Mojtaba, US political commitment to regime change, China mediation
models_loaded.output_summary: Mojtaba commitment score 0.3 (lacks institutional legitimacy); US commitment 0.55 (high sunk cost but eroding); China commitment 0.2 (no skin in game)

models_loaded.input_summary: Audience cost analysis for Netanyahu regime change pledge, US administration war commitment, Iranian retaliation pledges
models_loaded.output_summary: Netanyahu locked in (audience cost >0.8); US administration moderate lock-in (0.55); Iranian audience costs distributed across fragmented actors (effectively lower per-actor)

divergence_flags.model_a_says: Feedback loop reinforces protracted conflict — both sides approach limits simultaneously around W8-10
divergence_flags.model_b_says: Asymmetry favors US — Iran ballistic missile stock is non-renewable while US can receive allied transfers, Iran hits ceiling first around W5-6

shs_writeback.trigger_reason: No new evidence to update; IRGC succession node remains at fragmentation focal equilibrium (0.45 prob), consistent with hypothesis
No new evidence; divergence flag DIV_001 notes asymmetry debate but insufficient to shift confidence without observational data on intercept rates

Hybrid node oil_price_regime_shift baseline 0.62 overridden down to 0.58 by strategic analysis (China rhetorical-only stance reduces supply disruption escalation probability); slight downward pressure on stagflation hypothesis
Divergence on timeline asymmetry (DIV_001) but no resolution — maintaining confidence pending intercept rate data

graph_proposals.justification: DIV_001 divergence flag highlights that allied ammo transfers could significantly extend the depletion timeline; current DAG lacks this pathway. Adding this node allows explicit tracking of transfer signals and their impact on the ammo ceiling hypothesis.
H1 commitment paradox implies IRGC fragmentation directly blocks negotiated pause viability; this causal link is implicit in scenario analysis but not explicit in DAG structure
